{{Quote|The first thing I need is on a freighter called the Shifty Prince. It is carrying a load of phasotron radium and is in the Naboo system right now.|[[Droz]]|<ref name="SWG:ItSP" />}}
The '''''Shifty Prince''''' was a light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] in use during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> the ''Shifty Prince'' was transporting a load of [[phasotron radium]] in the [[Naboo system/Legends|Naboo system]] when it was forced to stop by an independent spacer in a heavily armed ship. The spacer, who had been hired by the [[Droz|station master]] of the [[Dantooine Space Station]], boarded the freighter and stole the phasotron radium.<ref name="SWG:ItSP" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Shifty Prince'' appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:ItSP" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> The ''Shifty Prince'' was added to the game with the release of the expansion pack [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed|''Jump to Lightspeed'']] on [[October 27]], [[2004]]. It was the first target of a mission that was available to players when communicating with the Dantooine Space Station. The second target was the freighter ''[[Bez'ox Mentzz]]'', the third the ''[[Lord's Mistress]]''.<ref name="SWG:ItSP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
